Class GeneralSettings.Builder

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.general.GeneralSettings.Builder
Enclosing class:
GeneralSettings
public static class GeneralSettings.Builder extends Object
Builder for general settings.

      public GeneralSettings.Builder setKeyFormat(@NotNull GeneralSettings.KeyFormat keyFormat)

      Default: GeneralSettings.DEFAULT_KEY_FORMATTING

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the builder

      public GeneralSettings.Builder setRouteSeparator(char separator)
      Sets route separator used to separate individual keys inside a string route and vice-versa.

      Default: GeneralSettings.DEFAULT_ROUTE_SEPARATOR

      Parameters:
      separator - the separator to use
      Returns:
      the builder

      Default: GeneralSettings.DEFAULT_SERIALIZER

      Parameters:
      serializer - the serializer to use
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setUseDefaults

      public GeneralSettings.Builder setUseDefaults(boolean useDefaults)
      Sets if to enable use of the defaults by Section methods (if any are present).

      Not effective if there are no defaults associated with the document.

      If enabled (true):

      • Bulk getter methods (which return a set/map of all keys, routes, values, blocks) will not only include content from the file, but also from the equivalent section in the defaults.
      • Value getters with signature getX(route) will search the defaults as documented. You can also view the behaviour in the call stack below:
        1. Is there any value at the specified route?
          • 1A. Yes: Is it compatible with the return type (see method documentation)?
            • 2A. Yes: Return it.
            • 2B. No: Is there an equivalent of this section in the defaults (Section.hasDefaults())?
              • 3A. Yes: Return the value returned by calling the same method on the default section equivalent (Section.getDefaults()).
              • 3B. No: Return the default value defined by the settings (see method documentation).
          • 1B. No: Continue with 2B.
      If disabled (false):
      • None of the Section methods will interact with the defaults.
      • This is recommended if you would like to handle all value absences (present in the defaults, but not in the file) and invalid values manually - e.g. notifying the user and then using the default value defined within final fields, or obtained via Section.getDefaults().

      Default: GeneralSettings.DEFAULT_USE_DEFAULTS

      Parameters:
      useDefaults - if to use defaults
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setDefaultObject

      public GeneralSettings.Builder setDefaultObject(@Nullable Object defaultObject)
      Sets default object used by section getters if the return type is object.

      Default: GeneralSettings.DEFAULT_OBJECT

      Parameters:
      defaultObject - default object
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setDefaultNumber

      public GeneralSettings.Builder setDefaultNumber(@NotNull Number defaultNumber)
      Sets default number used by section getters if the return type is a number - integer, float, byte, biginteger... (per the getter documentation).

      Default: GeneralSettings.DEFAULT_NUMBER

      The given default can not be null as multiple section getters derive their defaults from this default (using Number.intValue()...).

      Parameters:
      defaultNumber - default number
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setDefaultString

      public GeneralSettings.Builder setDefaultString(@Nullable String defaultString)
      Sets default string used by section getters if the return type is string.

      Default: GeneralSettings.DEFAULT_STRING

      Parameters:
      defaultString - default string
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setDefaultChar

      public GeneralSettings.Builder setDefaultChar(@Nullable Character defaultChar)
      Sets default char used by section getters if the return type is char.

      Default: GeneralSettings.DEFAULT_CHAR

      The parameter is not of a primitive type, to allow for null values. Setting the default to such value might produce unexpected issues, unless your program is adapted for it. On the other hand, there are methods returning optionals, so having default value like this is rather pointless.

      Parameters:
      defaultChar - default char
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setDefaultBoolean

      public GeneralSettings.Builder setDefaultBoolean(@Nullable Boolean defaultBoolean)
      Sets default boolean used by section getters if the return type is boolean.

      Default: GeneralSettings.DEFAULT_BOOLEAN

      The parameter is not of a primitive type, to allow for null values. Setting the default to such value might produce unexpected issues, unless your program is adapted for it. On the other hand, there are methods returning optionals, so having default value like this is rather pointless.

      Parameters:
      defaultBoolean - default boolean
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setDefaultList

      public GeneralSettings.Builder setDefaultList(@NotNull ListSupplier defaultList)
      Sets default list supplier used to supply list instances during loading/when needed.

      Default: GeneralSettings.DEFAULT_LIST

      Parameters:
      defaultList - the supplier
      Returns:
      the builder

      public GeneralSettings.Builder setDefaultSet(@NotNull SetSupplier defaultSet)
